title: PerimeterLayout
description: PerimeterLayout: Linear distribution of points along the perimeter of the host object.

NumberOfPoints.description: Number of points along the perimeter of the host object

EnforceDiscontinuityPoints.description: True means that the discontinuity points of the hostobject curve always should be included in point extraction from the layout.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
